clusters.justification: These terms share co-activations in regions such as the amygdala and anterior insula, representing the macro-level domain responsible for experiencing, processing, and regulating emotional valences and mood states.

These concepts converge on frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitries, forming the macroscopic functional domain that computes subjective worth and incentive salience to guide goal-directed choices and motivated behavior.

Driven by co-activations within the default mode network, this domain binds internally-generated representations required to construct longitudinal models of the self, autobiographical narratives, and the mental states of other agents.
